The '''''Spear''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was usually seen escorting the [[Defiance Task Force]], and carried a cargo of [[Tauntaun/Legends|tauntauns]]. It managed to escape with the rest of the fleet after Rebel pilots eliminated their pursuers after the disastrous [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
